problem id: b9734394
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND SHR(5)

examples:
  10011010 -> 00000100
  01000111 -> 00000010
  00001000 -> 00000000
  10111110 -> 00000101
  10001111 -> 00000100
  10100011 -> 00000001
  10111011 -> 00000101
  10001010 -> 00000100
  00101100 -> 00000000

query: 01011101
predicted answer: 00000010
